title: Molson Coors (TAP) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Molson Coors' (TAP) first-quarter results are expected to reflect the benefits of robust pricing actions, a revitalization plan and the premiumization of its global portfolio.

title: 5 Stocks Poised to Benefit From Favorable Alcohol Industry Trends
text: The Beverages - Alcohol industry looks poised for growth on favorable demand trends, innovation, diversification, premiumization and digital growth amid elevated input and packaging costs. Players like BUD, STZ, BF.B, TAP and NAPA will likely capitalize.

title: Coors stock surges 9% after backlash to Bud Light's Dylan Mulvaney campaign
text: Mulvaney, who has more than 10 million followers combined on TikTok and Instagram, revealed on April 1 that she would be pitching Bud Light.

title: Molson Coors (TAP) Banks on Revitalization Plan for Growth
text: Molson Coors (TAP) remains well placed on the back of its revitalization plan. The company's commitment to innovation and premiumization also bodes well.
